analysis: The last two nights are doing something — 7h 34m and then 7h 56m to close out the stretch, with awake time basically disappearing down to 21 and 19 minutes, which is genuinely impressive. Your REM has been climbing all week too, peaking at 2h 34m last night, and that kind of dreamy, consolidating sleep is your brain doing its best work. The earlier part of the stretch was scrappier — four nights under 6h 15m, and that 1h 47m awake on the 1st of July was rough — but whatever you're stacking with the shower, the yin, the magnesium, it's landing now. Deep sleep dipped a little toward the end of the week, so that's worth watching, but honestly the trajectory here is pointing somewhere good.
